title: Mindustrial
description: Mindustrial is a mod that brings elements from Mindustry into Minecraft, adding new resources, biomes, dimensions, and an achievement system.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79977aae129c6692bacd868c5b91b58ef9f499ed.png)

Mindustrial is a mod that brings elements from Mindustry into Minecraft, adding new resources, biomes, dimensions, and an achievement system.

Key Features:
New Ores and Materials
The world generates unique ores from Mindustry, including titanium, thorium, silicon, pyrotite, and more. These materials are essential for crafting new tools, armor, and advanced blocks. The mod also introduces alloys and refined materials that unlock stronger and more efficient items.

Dimensions
The mod adds several unique dimensions, each inspired by the worlds of Mindustry. These dimensions feature unusual landscapes, rare resources, and special environmental conditions that require adaptation and preparation before exploration.

New Biomes
Special biomes inspired by Mindustry locations can be found in the overworld. They feature unique terrain, soil colors, vegetation, and environmental conditions. For example, players can discover Ashen Deserts, Metallic Plains, and Foggy Tundras, each containing exclusive resources.

Achievement System
A new achievement tree has been added, focused on discovering new materials, dimensions, and biomes. Players can earn rewards for finding rare resources, crafting special items, and conquering dangerous territories.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

The main question: how are portals to different planets built?

 - Choose 1 of 3 blocks Titanium (Serpulo Key), Bervllium (Erekir Artifact) or Scrap (Asteroid Element).

</details>
